items.title: The End of Step Finance: How a Wallet Compromise Killed the Solana DeFi Aggregator
items.whyYouShouldCare: The collapse of a major DeFi aggregator highlights vulnerabilities in the Solana ecosystem, potentially impacting user trust and liquidity.

items.title: Three Solana data points highlight resilience, but is SOL undervalued?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Recent data suggests Solana's resilience, indicating a possible undervaluation that could attract new investors and enhance market positioning.

items.title: Solana [SOL] stalls at range highs as market panic overrides capital inflows
items.whyYouShouldCare: Current market panic is overshadowing positive capital inflows, which could hinder Solana's price recovery and ecosystem growth.
